title: Iran announces 'end of military operations' against Israel, but warns Lebanon strikes could trigger escalation
summary_full: Iran and Israel traded strikes on Sunday night for the first time since a ceasefire was agreed in April, threatening to torpedo an already-fragile ceasefire.
summary_public: Iran and Israel traded strikes on Sunday night for the first time since a ceasefire was agreed in April, threatening to torpedo an already-fragile ceasefire.
